articles.author: Kate Bartlett
articles.title: New Netflix documentary reexamines Winnie Mandela's divisive legacy - NPR
articles.description: Winnie Madikizela-Mandela is one of the most revered — and controversial — women in South African history. In a new documentary her granddaughters examine the liberation icon in all her complexity.
articles.content: JOHANNESBURG, South Africa Winnie Madikizela-Mandela is one of the most revered and controversial women in South African history, but to her grandchildren the anti-apartheid icon was always just thei… [+5862 chars]
